title: ALYBH-REconstruction
description: A Redesigned 16x Resource Packs set made by "ALYBH". With some Additional resource packs that can be combined to use.
body:
_（中文描述在下面 / Chinese Version Below）_  

<details>
<summary>Archiving Announcement / 归档告知</summary>

Due to limited personal capacity, the [ALYBH-REconstruction] series resource pack—given its sheer size and broad scope—will conclude updates for versions beyond JE 1.21.3. Only bug fixes based on reported issues will be maintained.  
If you're interested in continued updates and maintenance for the [ALYBH-REconstruction] series, feel free to reach out anytime for applying support and authorization (Contact: xxsbalyxx@qq.com).  

受个人精力所限，目前【ALYBH-REconstruction】系资源包因体量实在过大，涵盖内容过于广泛，将确定在进行 JE 1.21.3 版本的内容更新后停止对于 JE 1.21.3 之后的版本的更新，仅对反馈的问题进行修复维护。如果您对【ALYBH-REconstruction】这一资源包系列的更新和维护感兴趣，欢迎随时联系 xxsbalyxx@qq.com 并申请获取相关支持和授权。 

</details>


✧♢-Introduction-♢✧
-
Retaining the vanilla-like colors, all block and item textures have been redrawn for a fresh visual experience.
Hoping that the redesign can bring some different visual experiences.

Additionally, the list below provides supplementary resource packs.  
These packs provide extra contents, can be combined to use with this pack.  
Individual split packs for your convenience of assembly use also included.  
Click [links](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-reconstruction) below to view the packs.

▼△-Pack list-▼△
-
**ALYBH-REconstruction**: Main resource pack, can be directly download in this page, included these contents:

- **[Essential](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_essential)**: Including mainly textures such as Block, Item, GUI, particle, misc, armor, etc.
  
- **[Entity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_entity)**: Simply Mob textures for vacancies of Essential Pack.

- **[Models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_models)**(1.13+): 3D Models for Block, Item.

- **Emissive**(1.13+): Emissive Textures based on OptFine.

- **[512x]Parallax Maps**(1.13+): Visual enhancement based on labPBR.

**Additional Packs**:

- **[Shield to Banner Pattern](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_shield-to-banner-pattern)**: Change Shield Pattern to Banner Pattern.

- **[PVP-Lite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_pvp-lite)**: Visual change for PVP.

<details>
<summary>Compatibility</summary>
  
**Essential**, **Entity**, **Models**, **Shield to Banner Pattern**, **PVP-Lite** can be used indepently.  
  
**Emissive**, **Parallax Maps** are based on **Essential** or **Entity** pack.  

Some textures in **PVP-Lite** pack are not compatible with **Models** pack. 

</details>


❤♡-Statement-♡❤
-
This work is authorized for non-commercial purposes only.  
Proper attribution to the original author and a clear link to the source must be provided.  
Unauthorized reuploading, redistribution and commercial utilization are strictly prohibited.  
This content shall not be used for distortion, defamation, or any act that damages reputation.  
Any disputes arising from improper use shall be solely borne by the user, and the original author shall bear no responsibility therefor.  
All Rights Reserved.  
- _In the event of discrepancies statements contained in older versions, the above statements shall prevail._

◈❖Other Projects❖◈
-
[Bow and Crossbow Visual Changes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-and-crossbow-visual-changes)  
[Rainbow Enchant Glint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbow-enchant-glints)  
[3D Vanilla-like Item](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d_vanilla-like)  
Check my profile if you want to view more Resource Pack Projects.<3


<details>
<summary>|╱╲╱|简体中文介绍|╱╲╱|</summary>

在保留原版的配色风格上对方块、物品等纹理式样进行了重新绘制。  
希望本资源包的再次设计能够给你带来不一样的视觉体验。  
此外，还附有多种可以自行添加、替换的附加资源包，也有单独的拆分包供使用。

资源包列表  
-
**ALYBH-REconstruction**（ALY式重构）：主资源包，直接下载会下载这个，包含以下内容：  
- **基本纹理**（[Essential](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_essential)）：主要包括纹理，如方块，物品，图形界面，粒子，杂项，盔甲等。  
- **实体纹理**（[Entity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_entity)）：生物纹理，补齐基本包的空缺。  
- **3D模型**（[Models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_models)）(1.13+)：方块、物品的3D模型。  
- **发光纹理**（Emissive）(1.13+)：基于OptFine的光纹理。  
- **[512x]视差贴图**（Parallax Maps）(1.13+)：基于labPBR的视觉增强。  

**附加资源包**：

- **盾旗图案**（[Shield to Banner Pattern](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_shield-to-banner-pattern)）：改变盾旗图案旗帜图案。  
- **[PVP-Lite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alybh-re_pvp-lite)**: 主要用于PVP的视觉改变。 

**兼容性**：  
Essential、Entity、Shield to Banner Pattern、PVP-Lite 可以单独使用。  
Emissive, Parallax Maps 需要 Essential 或 Entity 包。  
PVP-Lite 不能与 Models 一起使用。 

**声明**：  
    本作品仅允许用于非商业用途。必须明确标注原作者的名义，并提供指向原文的清晰链接。  
    严禁未经许可擅自重新上传、分发或将其用于商业用途。  
    不得利用该作品进行任何诋毁、中伤或损害他人声誉的行为。  
    因使用不当而产生的任何纠纷，均由用户自行承担，原作者不承担任何责任。    
	保留全部权利。  
    **如果旧版本中陈述存在差异，应以上述陈述为准。**

</details>
